---
title: "CPESR Assises"
author: "CPESR"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
options(dplyr.summarise.inform = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.asp = 9/16, fig.retina = 2)

library(tidyverse)
library(ggcpesrthemes)
library(kpiESR)
theme_set(theme_cpesr())
theme_cpesr_setup(authors = "Julien Gossa", source = "https://github.com/cpesr/RFC/")
```

## Données 

- url source

```{r load}
scsp <- esr.pnl %>% 
  filter(pid %in% c("Ensemble","Universités et assimilés")) %>% 
  filter(kpi %in% c("kpi.FIN.S.SCSP","kpi.ETU.P.effectif")) %>% 
  select(pid,Rentrée,kpi,valeur)
```


```{r}
scsp %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Rentrée,y=valeur,color=pid)) + 
  geom_line() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2018) +
  facet_grid(kpi~.,scales="free_y")
```



```{r}
bind_rows(
  scsp %>% filter(Rentrée == 2018),
  scsp %>% filter(Rentrée != 2018) ) %>%
  mutate(valeur100 = valeur / first(valeur) * 100, .by=c(kpi,pid)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Rentrée,y=valeur100,color=pid)) + 
  geom_line() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2018) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 100) +
  facet_grid(kpi~.,scales="free_y")
```
